roles.label: Release Steward
approvalDuties: Approve an eligible Release Manifest before privileged effects.
auditSurface: Approved Release Manifest identity and digest
roles.continuityRequirement: A distinct continuity custodian is required before publication.
roles.roleCombinationConstraints: Roles may be combined, but each action requires an explicit asserted role.

roles.label: Repository Administrator
roles.decisionScope: Repository protections, applications, credentials, emergency stop, containment, revocation, and succession activation.
approvalDuties: Maintain emergency containment and succession readiness.
roles.continuityRequirement: Emergency succession activation must be auditable.
roles.roleCombinationConstraints: Roles may be combined, but each action requires an explicit asserted role.

roles.label: Security Steward
roles.decisionScope: Vulnerability disposition, disclosure/remediation policy, and time-bounded security exceptions.
approvalDuties: Record security disposition and time bounds.
roles.continuityRequirement: Security exception ownership must remain time-bounded.
roles.roleCombinationConstraints: Roles may be combined, but each action requires an explicit asserted role.

roles.label: Package Steward
roles.decisionScope: Correctness and public verification obligations for assigned Release Units.
approvalDuties: Verify assigned Release Unit correctness when assignments exist.
roles.continuityRequirement: Assignments and continuity custodians are deferred to Story 1.2.
roles.roleCombinationConstraints: Roles may be combined, but each action requires an explicit asserted role.

roles.label: Release Run Coordinator
roles.decisionScope: Sequence Release Run events and execute already-authorized actions.
approvalDuties: Sequence only actions already authorized by the asserted role.
roles.continuityRequirement: Release Run sequencing must remain reproducible.
roles.roleCombinationConstraints: Roles may be combined, but each action requires an explicit asserted role.

governanceRoute.publicReviewRequirement: GOVERNANCE.md remains binding, including the 14-day breaking-change comment period and RFC process.
governanceRoute.nonBypassStatement: This recovery governance record cannot bypass or redefine the formal source-of-truth hierarchy.

publicationBlock: Contract validation does not prove live workflow or provider enforcement. Publication remains blocked until Story 1.2 resolves assignments and continuity and Epic 2 corrects and verifies external controls.
